# `api.companies.get_carrier_accounts`

> `GET /companies/{companyId}/carrierAcounts` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.companies.get_carrier_accounts(company_id: str) -> list[CarrierAccount]
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab companies get_carrier_accounts <company_id>
```

GET /companies/{companyId}/carrierAcounts

## Response

Returns a list of `List[CarrierAccount]`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | `Optional[str]` | no | Carrier account ID |
| `carrierName` | `Optional[str]` | no | Carrier name |
| `accountNumber` | `Optional[str]` | no | Account number |
